## Results
### Command 1: `uv run pytest tests/commands/launch/ -v`
pytest passed: 39 tests passed in 1.09 seconds
**Details:** - tests/commands/launch/test_launch_cmd.py: 25 passed - tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py: 14 passed
### Command 2: `uv run pytest tests/tui/ -v`
pytest failed: Import error during test collection
**Issue:** ``` ERROR tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py ImportError: cannot import name 'PlanFilters' from 'erk.tui.data.types' ```
The test module at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py` is trying to import `PlanFilters` from `erk.tui.data.types`, but this class/symbol is not available at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/data/types.py`. This is a broken import that prevents the entire TUI test suite from being collected.
